TEXT: Somethign something lore NL something something gameplaystyle
NL You dab the heart into submission.

Navigating an unlit street, you come across several hooded figures in the midst of a feast upon mounds of raw flesh. As you approach, they turn to you in eerie unison. The tallest among them bares a fanged grin and extends a long, pale hand towards you. NL ~"Welcome,~ ~devourer~ ~of~ ~man.~ ~Will~ ~you~ ~partake?"~
